title: senecio bulbosus
intro: Senecio bulbosus, also known as Wood Germander, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio bulbosus include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to use caution and consult with a healthcare professional before consuming it due to its potential toxicity.
